description_long: This is a large, red pickup truck with a robust and angular body design, featuring a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The vehicle has four doors, with two on each side, and is equipped with prominent side mirrors and rugged wheels suitable for urban and off-road environments. The front grille is wide and flanked by rectangular headlights, while the rear includes a tailgate and visible taillights. The windows are tinted gray, and the truck has a set of running boards beneath the doors for easier entry. The overall build suggests a heavy-duty frame, likely constructed from metal with some plastic and glass components. The truck's styling and proportions are reminiscent of American brands such as Ford, with a utilitarian yet modern appearance.
description: A large, red four-door pickup truck with a spacious cargo bed, rugged wheels, and a robust, angular design. Features include a wide front grille, tinted windows, and running boards.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, taillights, and rear bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, running board, and the full length of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four doors, running board, and cargo bed.
